commands.review_summary:
The branch changes WhatsApp Web auto-reply delivery so a failed non-first media attachment sends a short warning text, with a regression test for the two-attachment failure path.

PR surface: Source +9, Tests +41. Total +50 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection, but not from a live repro: current main logs and returns for non-first media errors before any user-visible fallback.
